CLI Reference

CLI Reference

Overview

The PDS command-line interface is provided by the kaszlak binary (macOS) or september binary (Linux).

Global Options

--help

Display help message.

./kaszlak --help

--version

Display version information.

./kaszlak --version

--config

Specify configuration file path.

./kaszlak --config ./config.json

--data-dir

Specify data directory path.

./kaszlak --data-dir ./pds-data

--verbose

Enable verbose logging.

./kaszlak --verbose

--json

Output in JSON format.

./kaszlak --json

Commands

server

Start the PDS server.

./kaszlak server --config config.json --data-dir ./pds-data

Options: - --config — Configuration file path - --data-dir — Data directory path - --port — Server port (overrides config) - --verbose — Verbose logging

account

Manage user accounts.

account create

Create a new user account.

./kaszlak account create \
  --email user@example.com \
  --handle user.example.com \
  --password password123

Options: - --email — User email (required) - --handle — User handle (required) - --password — User password (required) - --invite-code — Invite code (if required)

Output:

{
  "did": "did:plc:user123",
  "handle": "user.example.com",
  "email": "user@example.com"
}

account delete

Delete a user account.

./kaszlak account delete --did did:plc:user123

Options: - --did — User DID (required)

account list

List all user accounts.

./kaszlak account list --limit 10

Options: - --limit — Number of accounts to list - --cursor — Pagination cursor

invite

Manage invite codes.

invite create

Create an invite code.

./kaszlak invite create

Output:

{
  "code": "abc123def456",
  "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "expiresAt": "2024-02-01T00:00:00Z"
}

invite list

List all invite codes.

./kaszlak invite list

Output:

{
  "invites": [
    {
      "code": "abc123def456",
      "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "expiresAt": "2024-02-01T00:00:00Z",
      "usedBy": "did:plc:user123"
    }
  ]
}

invite revoke

Revoke an invite code.

./kaszlak invite revoke --code abc123def456

Options: - --code — Invite code (required)

database

Manage databases.

database migrate

Run database migrations.

./kaszlak database migrate

database backup

Backup databases.

./kaszlak database backup --output ./backup.tar.gz

Options: - --output — Output file path (required)

database restore

Restore databases from backup.

./kaszlak database restore --input ./backup.tar.gz

Options: - --input — Input file path (required)

admin

Administrative commands.

admin takedown

Takedown a record.

./kaszlak admin takedown --uri at://did:plc:user123/app.bsky.feed.post/abc123

Options: - --uri — Record URI (required)

admin suspend

Suspend a user account.

./kaszlak admin suspend --did did:plc:user123

Options: - --did — User DID (required)

admin label

Apply a label to a record.

./kaszlak admin label --uri at://did:plc:user123/app.bsky.feed.post/abc123 --label spam

Options: - --uri — Record URI (required) - --label — Label to apply (required)

health

Check server health.

./kaszlak health

Output:

{
  "status": "ok",
  "uptime": 3600,
  "version": "1.0.0"
}

config

Manage configuration.

config validate

Validate configuration file.

./kaszlak config validate --config config.json

Options: - --config — Configuration file path (required)

config show

Display current configuration.

./kaszlak config show

Examples

Start Server

./kaszlak server \
  --config ./config.json \
  --data-dir ./pds-data \
  --verbose

Create Account

./kaszlak account create \
  --email alice@example.com \
  --handle alice.example.com \
  --password secure-password-123

Create Invite Code

./kaszlak invite create

Backup Database

./kaszlak database backup --output ./backup-$(date +%Y%m%d).tar.gz

Check Health

./kaszlak health --json

Exit Codes

Code Meaning
0 Success
1 General error
2 Command-line syntax error
3 Configuration error
4 Database error
5 Network error

Environment Variables

PDS_CONFIG

Configuration file path.

export PDS_CONFIG=./config.json
./kaszlak server

PDS_DATA_DIR

Data directory path.

export PDS_DATA_DIR=./pds-data
./kaszlak server

PDS_LOG_LEVEL

Log level.

export PDS_LOG_LEVEL=debug
./kaszlak server

Troubleshooting

Command not found

# Make sure binary is in PATH
export PATH=$PATH:./build/bin
./kaszlak --version

Configuration error

# Validate configuration
./kaszlak config validate --config config.json

Database error

# Check database
./kaszlak database migrate

Next Steps
